page_metadata.biotools__summary: AMPZero is a predictor designed for predicting the effectiveness of a peptide sequence against various microbial species. The predictor takes the peptide sequence and any N/C-termini modifications together with the genomic sequence of a microbial species to generate targeted predictions.
